Article.ArticleTitle: Time-of-day effects on blood lactate levels following the Wingate anaerobic test in trained women athletes.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Faculty of Sport Science, Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University, Burdur, Türkiye. yakupkose@mehmetakif.edu.tr.
Faculty of Sport Science, Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University, Burdur, Türkiye.
Faculty of Sport Science, İnönü University, Malatya, Türkiye.
Institute of Educational Sciences, Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University, Burdur, Türkiye.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Ethical approval for this study was obtained from the Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University GOKA Ethics Committee (Approval No: GO 2025/1424). The study was conducted in accordance with the principles of the Declaration of Helsinki. Before participation, all participants were fully informed about the study procedures, potential risks, and possible discomforts, and written informed consent was obtained from all participants. During the study, participants were continuously monitored, and appropriate measures were taken to manage any potential adverse effects. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
